Deep-space-indigo: Endless void punctuated by distant starlight. Indigo, starlight-white, silver, black-void create profound cosmic solitude.
Nebula-pink: Stellar nursery glowing with star birth. Rose-pink, violet, amber, deep-blue evoke celestial clouds in formation.
Ion-teal: Electric propulsion trails through darkness. Teal, cyan, silver, deep-navy capture advanced spacecraft energy signatures.
Blade-Runner-neon: Rain-soaked dystopian cityscape at night. Magenta, cyan, amber, oil-black define cyberpunk urban decay aesthetics.
Dune-sepia: Arrakis desert under twin suns. Rust-orange, tan, deep-shadow-brown, cream capture arid spice-world atmosphere.
Ice-blue: Frozen moon surface under distant sun. Pale-blue, crystal-white, silver, deep-cobalt evoke glacial alien terrain.
Gas-giant-cream-and-gold: Jupiter's churning atmospheric bands. Cream, gold, amber, burnt-umber mirror swirling planetary storms.
JWST-infrared: Deep-field observation revealing hidden universe. Deep-orange, teal, burnt-amber, cobalt translate invisible wavelengths to vision.
Annihilation-shimmer: Reality-bending extraterrestrial contamination zone. Pearl, iridescent, moss, faded-rose create unsettling biomechanical transformation.

Foundation-ambers: Trantor's galaxy-spanning empire at dusk. Warm-copper, black, deep-gold convey imperial grandeur and decline.
Alien-xenomorph: Nostromo corridors dripping with biomechanical horror. Oil-black, bone-white, teal-slime create claustrophobic dread.
Moon-surface-grey: Apollo landing site bathed in Earthlight. Pewter, bone, black-shadow, amber-earth capture lunar desolation.
Mars-rust: Olympus Mons beneath thin carbon-dioxide sky. Rust-red, tan, deep-shadow-brown, pale-sky evoke oxidized frontier.
Titan-orange: Methane lakes under Saturn's distant glow. Orange, brown, amber, deep-teal-sky suggest hydrocarbon mystery.
Orion-nebula: Trapezium cluster igniting molecular hydrogen clouds. Red-amber, teal, gold, deep-blue reveal stellar forge majesty.
